name: Watermelon Cucumber Salad
instructions:
1. Cube the watermelon and slice the cucumber. 
2. Halve the cherry tomatoes. 
3. In a large bowl, combine watermelon, cucumber, and cherry tomatoes. 
4. Squeeze lime juice over the mixture and gently toss. 
5. If desired, crumble feta cheese on top. 
6. Garnish with fresh mint leaves before serving.
